TN 1224537--1/22/2016 Carina [Looking for an original of a reprint from The Democrat and Chronicle, 1901. Searching in The Chicago Record, TN 1224537. First day and first run through, due to the type of headline and length of the article, I focused on looking at the larger headlines in the paper. Came across damaged portion of the reel and returned the next day to repair it and finish first reel of microfilm; article was not found. I looked through the reels again to make sure I hadn't missed it, this time also scanning smaller headlines in case there was an alteration when copied over. Article was not found; no documents created. Reel marked as damaged and returned to Circulation to be sent back through ILL.]
